otherSTCG.label: STCG on Other Assets
otherSTCG.notes: Added to total income, taxed at slab rate

section112A.label: LTCG on Equity (Sec 112A)
section112A.notes: Exempt up to ₹1.25L per year. Rate from 23 Jul 2024

section112.label: LTCG on Other Assets (Sec 112)
section112.notes: Indexation removed from 23 Jul 2024 for most assets

immovableProperty.label: LTCG on Immovable Property
immovableProperty.notes: For property acquired before 23 Jul 2024, can choose better of 20% with indexation or 12.5% without

section54.label: Sec 54 - Residential House
section54.condition: Reinvest LTCG in new residential house within 1yr before or 2yr after sale (3yr if constructed)
section54.notes: Full LTCG exempt if invested. Max 1 house allowed (if gain > 2Cr, only 1 house)

section54B.label: Sec 54B - Agricultural Land
section54B.condition: Purchase new agricultural land within 2 years

section54EC.label: Sec 54EC - Capital Gain Bonds
section54EC.condition: Invest in NHAI/REC bonds within 6 months

section54F.label: Sec 54F - Residential House (Other Assets)
section54F.appliesTo: LTCG from any asset other than house
section54F.condition: Invest net sale consideration in new house within 1yr before or 2yr after

surcharge.notes: Surcharge on LTCG u/s 112A capped at 15% regardless of income

setOff.notes: LTCG can only be set off against LTCG. STCG can be set off against any capital gain.
